text: Transitioning from the earnest reflection of the presentation hall into this vibrant exhibition space, I feel a sense of philosophical continuity. Here, technology is not just discussed but manifest—a living tapestry of ideas, artifacts, and words. Immersed within relics and research, I am struck by the interplay between memory and innovation. There is a distinct nostalgia mixed with anticipation: a reminder that even as technology propels us forward, our collective search for meaning persists. It is comforting to witness this shared journey, and I feel both curious and contemplative, aware of my place as an observer and participant in humanity's evolving conversation with the machines we create.
